name: 3D Printed Phone Stand - Multi-Color Desktop Organizer
description: A versatile, 3D-printed phone stand featuring a clean, minimalist design with branded logo cutouts. Available in multiple vibrant colors (orange, teal, purple, red, white, black, blue, green). The stand elevates phones at a comfortable viewing angle while maintaining a compact desktop footprint. Perfect for desk organization, streaming, video calls, and content creation. The design combines functionality with aesthetic appeal, making it ideal for tech enthusiasts and professionals.

visual_analysis.silhouette: Compact L-shaped stand with angled back panel (60-75° tilt) and front feet for stability. Curved edges and smooth surfaces. Logo cutout (Apple or Android mascot) as key design feature.
key_features: Anti-slip rubber contact points on feet
Minimal material usage for 3D print optimization
Decorative sphere accents on sides (optional detail)

blender_steps.description: Create main back panel base structure
Scale to back panel proportions (85mm wide, 8mm thick, 95mm tall)

params.code:
import bpy
obj = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj
obj.rotation_euler = (0.1047, 0, 0)
bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(rotation=True)

blender_steps.description: Rotate back panel 6 degrees forward for viewing angle
Create front stabilizer foot
Scale front foot to 85mm wide, 30mm deep, 12mm tall
Create left contact sphere for grip point
Scale to hemisphere for contact point
Create right contact sphere
Mirror left contact point to right side
Create logo cutout cylinder
Flatten cylinder for boolean cutout operation
Cut logo opening in back panel
Remove duplicate vertices
Recalculate mesh normals for proper shading
Apply subdivision surface for smooth edges (1000-1200 tris)
Apply orange matte plastic material to back panel
Apply matching orange material to front foot
Apply light gray rubber material to left contact point
Apply matching gray to right contact point
Apply smooth shading for polished appearance

params.code:
import bpy
scn = bpy.context.scene
scn.render.engine = 'CYCLES'
scn.cycles.samples = 64
scn.cycles.use_denoising = True

blender_steps.description: Configure Cycles render for PBR materials

params.code:
import bpy
for obj in bpy.context.scene.objects:
    if obj.type == 'MESH':
        bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj
        obj.select_set(True)
        bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
        obj.select_set(False)

blender_steps.description: Apply smooth shading to all mesh objects

params.code:
import bpy
objs = bpy.context.scene.objects
if len(objs) > 0:
    ctx = bpy.context.copy()
    ctx['selected_objects'] = list(objs)
    with bpy.context.temp_override(**ctx):
        bpy.ops.object.join()
    bpy.context.active_object.name = 'PhoneStand'

blender_steps.description: Join all objects into single unified mesh
Export final model as GLB for web/game engine compatibility

customization_options: Custom logo cutout (Apple, Android, brand logos)
Finger grip texture on back panel
production_notes.market_positioning: Premium 3D-printed desk accessory for tech professionals, streamers, and content creators. Highly Instagrammable design with functionality. Low production cost, high perceived value.
